title: VUL's Create Cursors
description: Brass-styled cursors for Minecraft Cursor mod
body:
**VUL's Create Cursors** will add custom cursors to your [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) experience via [Cursors Extended](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-cursor) mod.

This pack was inspired by [Create brass cursors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-brass-style-cursors).

All 12 cursors have been fully redone to match Create's Brass Casing block. Including small animations for Busy and Grabbing.

![First six](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdc22662f9ea198cd1ffb727f1d483f3acf46867_0.webp) ![Second six](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5d46af28980da0c1881421cb894ee820af85b7_0.webp)

_Remember, you have an option to configure them in mod's config via mod menu._
